paragraphs.zh: 觀自在菩薩，行深般若波羅蜜多時，照見五蘊皆空，度一切苦厄。
paragraphs.en: Avalokiteshvara Bodhisattva, while practicing the profound Prajna-paramita (Perfection of Wisdom), clearly saw that all five skandhas are empty, and was thereby freed from all suffering and distress.

paragraphs.zh: 舍利子, 色不異空, 空不異色；色即是空, 空即是色。受、想、行、識，亦復如是。
paragraphs.en: Shariputra, form is not different from emptiness, emptiness is not different from form; form itself is emptiness, emptiness itself is form. The same is true of feeling, perception, mental formations, and consciousness.

paragraphs.zh: 舍利子，是諸法空相：不生、不滅；不垢、不凈；不增、不減。
paragraphs.en: Shariputra, all dharmas are marked by emptiness: they neither arise nor cease, are neither defiled nor pure, neither increase nor decrease.

paragraphs.zh: 是故空中無色。無受、想、行、識；無眼、耳、鼻、舌、身、意；無色、香、聲、味、觸、法。無眼界，乃至無意識界；
paragraphs.en: Therefore, in emptiness there is no form, no feeling, perception, mental formation, or consciousness; no eye, ear, nose, tongue, body, or mind; no form, sound, smell, taste, touch, or object of mind; no realm of sight, up to and including no realm of mind-consciousness.

paragraphs.zh: 無無明，亦無無明盡；乃至無老死，亦無老死盡。無苦、集、滅、道。
paragraphs.en: There is no ignorance, and no ending of ignorance, up to and including no old age and death, and no ending of old age and death. There is no suffering, no cause of suffering, no cessation of suffering, and no path.

paragraphs.zh: 無智亦無得，以無所得故，菩提薩埵。依般若波羅蜜多故。心無掛礙，無掛礙故。無有恐怖，遠離顛倒夢想、究竟涅磐。
paragraphs.en: There is no wisdom and no attainment, because there is nothing to attain. The Bodhisattva, relying on Prajna-paramita, has a mind free of obstacles. Because there are no obstacles, there is no fear, and one is far removed from all distorted dream-thinking, reaching ultimate Nirvana.

paragraphs.zh: 三世諸佛，依般若波羅蜜多故。得阿耨多羅三藐三菩提。
paragraphs.en: All Buddhas of the past, present, and future rely on Prajna-paramita to attain Anuttara-samyak-sambodhi, supreme perfect enlightenment.

paragraphs.zh: 故知般若波羅蜜多，是大神咒，是大明咒，是無上咒，是無等等咒。能除壹切苦，真實不虛。
paragraphs.en: Therefore know that Prajna-paramita is the great mantra, the mantra of great clarity, the supreme mantra, the unequaled mantra, able to remove all suffering — this is true, not false.

paragraphs.zh: 故說般若波羅蜜多咒，即說咒曰：“揭諦！揭諦！波羅揭諦！波羅僧揭諦！菩提薩婆訶！”
paragraphs.en: Therefore proclaim the Prajna-paramita mantra, the mantra that says: Gate gate paragate parasamgate bodhi svaha! (Gone, gone, gone beyond, gone completely beyond, awakening, so be it!)
